tamizajesTooltip: Register and review cross-cutting patient screenings.
cardiometabolicScreeningDescription: Screening for diabetes, hypertension, and cardiovascular risk for early identification.
hivScreeningDescription: Review HIV screening, initial test, and HTS results registered in the patient chart.
mentalHealthScreeningDescription: Brief mental health and psychosocial screening for referral or follow-up.
screeningWorklistDescription: Operational access to register, review, and organize screenings that may feed case follow-up or specialized care.
tbScreeningDescription: Initial assessment of signs, symptoms, and criteria for tuberculosis rule-out or referral.
